summary: Empty package with postinstall marker file and self-referential dependency
details: vkzmn@1.0.2 ships no real code: package.json declares main as index.js but no index.js is present in the tarball, README and author/description fields are empty, and the package declares a self-referential dependency on vkzmn ^1.0.1. The only install-time action is a postinstall script that runs 'touch /tmp/a', which creates an empty marker file with no network activity, no credential access, and no code execution beyond the touch itself. Shape is consistent with a dependency-confusion proof-of-concept or namespace placeholder rather than a functional library. No exfiltration, no remote fetch, no persistence, and no installer harm are present in this version.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
